info.name: Smart Recruitment Platform - Complete Backend
info.description: Complete professional Postman collection for the Laravel 12 Smart Recruitment Platform backend. Covers implemented REST API routes under /api/v1 with Sanctum bearer authentication, realistic request bodies, role notes, and automatic token/resource ID capture scripts.

request.description:
Purpose: Register a new job seeker account and create its empty candidate profile.

Required role: Public

Important notes: Use a unique email address; the default example uses Postman timestamp interpolation.

exec: let current = value.data !== undefined ? value.data : value;
if (value[key] !== undefined && value[key] !== null) return value[key];
if (found !== null && found !== undefined) return found;
if (found !== null && found !== undefined) pm.environment.set(variableName, String(found));

request.description:
Purpose: Register a new employer account, company, and employer profile.

Required role: Public

Important notes: Use a unique email address and a company name for the employer onboarding flow.

body.raw:
{
    "name":  "Demo Employer",
    "email":  "employer+{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
    "company_name":  "Demo Hiring Company",
    "password":  "password",
    "password_confirmation":  "password"
}

exec: let current = value.data !== undefined ? value.data : value;
if (value[key] !== undefined && value[key] !== null) return value[key];
if (found !== null && found !== undefined) return found;
if (found !== null && found !== undefined) pm.environment.set(variableName, String(found));

Important notes: Requires job_seeker_token.

request.description:
Purpose: Update candidate headline, summary, contact links, and location.

Required role: Job seeker

Important notes: All fields are optional but URLs must be valid.

body.raw:
{
    "headline":  "Laravel Backend Developer",
    "summary":  "Backend engineer experienced in Laravel, REST APIs, MySQL, queues, and clean service-oriented code.",
    "phone":  "+1 555 0100",
    "location":  "Remote",
    "portfolio_url":  "https://portfolio.example.com",
    "linkedin_url":  "https://linkedin.com/in/example-candidate",
    "github_url":  "https://github.com/example-candidate"
}

exec: let current = value.data !== undefined ? value.data : value;

if (found !== null && found !== undefined) return found;
if (found !== null && found !== undefined) pm.environment.set(variableName, String(found));

request.description:
Purpose: Create a draft job posting.

Required role: Employer

Important notes: Created jobs start as drafts; publish separately when ready.

{
    "title":  "Senior Laravel Backend Engineer",
    "description":  "Build and maintain REST APIs for a smart recruitment platform using Laravel, MySQL, queues, and Sanctum authentication.",
    "employment_type":  "full_time",
    "experience_level":  "senior",
    "location":  "Remote",
    "salary_min":  80000,
    "salary_max":  120000
}

item.name: 06 - Tests

request.description:
